visual_description: A woman with brown hair and blue eyes looks upward, her mouth slightly open, as her arm moves across the frame. A close-up shows a hand with visible veins and wires attached, resting on a dark, textured surface. The background is blurred and indistinct, focusing attention on the hand and the woman’s face.
